title: Infosys and Cognition Announce Strategic Collaboration to Scale Devin Across Global Enterprises
detailed_summary: Infosys and Cognition announced a strategic collaboration to scale Devin, Cognition's AI software engineer, across Infosys' internal engineering ecosystem and client engagements worldwide. The collaboration combines Devin with Infosys Topaz Fabric to support agentic and autonomous software engineering, with stated goals including faster time-to-market, enhanced developer productivity, reduced modernization timelines, brownfield engineering automation, tech debt reduction, and production support. Infosys said it had used Devin for the past six months and saw significant improvement in engineering quality and efficiency. Infosys' Financial Services practice is leading the first wave of joint client engagements across banking, payments, capital markets, insurance, and wealth management.
